string 2:
I'm glad you're here! You know... I have to apologize for my
rudeness before.

I'd be delighted if from now on any items crafted by this
workshop could serve you.

I'd need to charge for materials and labor, but all of our
items are top-shelf.
It's good to see you. What can I do for you today?
Show me what you've got for sale.
{next}Didn't you need some advice?
{end}I'll be back later.
Of course! Please take a look.

Yes, advice... Take a look at this. It washed up here not
too long ago.

It looks like an action-figure hand. But this detail! Like
it could come to life!
You appreciate fine cfraftmanship, too, yes?
Very well. I'll see you again, then.
{next}Yes, I do.
{next}Are those supposed to be earthworms?
{next}Are you sure this is from an action figure?

Ah, you have a keen eye! As you can see, each individual
finger is expertly recreated.

Well, I guess not all humans are well-versed in the art form
that is action figures.

What? You think it's an actual human hand?
Haha. No way... Or at least I hope not.

At any rate, it's a wonderful piece. You can really get a
feel for the artist's passion.

If possible, I'd like to get a figure from the same series
as this particular part.
Maybe you could go to that Akihabara place and look for it?
{next}Sure. No problem.
{next}Does it have to be Akihabara?
{end}Sorry. I'm busy right now. Maybe some other time.

Oh, so you'll do it? I'm looking forward to seeing
what you find.

Akihabara is where you can find all of the latest tech, so
I'd prefer you go there.

Yes, you must have a lot going on. Okay, please come back
when you've got some time.

I'd like to ask you again...
Would you go to Akihabara for me?
{next}Sure thing.
Show me what you've got for sale.
{end}I'm still busy.

Oh, so you'll do it? I'm looking forward to seeing what you
find.

You're still busy, huh? All right. Come back when you're
free.
Here. You can take this piece as a reference.

Oh, that reminds me... Something else washed ashore
with that part.

I think it's some kind of receipt from a model store.
You should check there first.
Well, good luck to you!

Welcome to my shop. What can I do for you?
Hm? This looks like an action figure part...

Even with twenty years of experience, I can't determine
the origin from the hand alone.

One of my regulars is even more knowledgeable than I am,
though. Maybe you could ask her?

Oh! This is quite the coincidence. I didn't know you also
liked action figures.
What's that you've got there? ...Huh? Wait... Oh!

It's off a limited-edition "snacking" version of the Sayori
the Cutie Magician figure!
{next}You know where this part is from?
{next}How could you tell from just the hand?
{next}You're really into this kind of thing.

Of course I do! It was all anybody could talk about. You
mean you don't know it?!

Look at the fingertips. The bits of sweets prove it's from
the snacking edition.

Well, action figures are an art form that I believe everyone
should take an interest in.

Someone was impressed by the level of detail and asked you
to look into this figure?

I suggest you buy the "Fully Poseable" Sayori figure.
They'll be super happy with it.

Also, I'd like to meet this person someday. I think we'd
have much to talk about.

Please introduce me if you ever get the chance. I think we'd
have much to talk about.

You want the Fully Poseable Sayori the Cutie Magician
figure?
You're lucky! This is the last one in stock!

Naturally, items this rare don't come cheap... It'll cost
600,000 YEN.
{next}That's way too much.
{next}Why does it cost so much?
{next}Can't you sell it a bit cheaper than that?!

I'm afraid this is my best offer. It's a difficult item to
keep in stock...

It's a popular item, so it's hard to keep in stock. I'm
barely making a profit here.

I know how you feel, but this is as low as I can go on this
particular item.
This is as low as the price can go. So, what'll it be?

I overheard you talking just now. The price has gone up
considerably since I last saw it.

I know someone asked you to look for the figure, but does it
have to do with Digimon?

If it's for a Digimon, I'll buy it for you... Please wrap it
up for us, would you?
Thank you for your business!

Wow... I was planning to just put it on display. I never
thought it'd actually sell!
I'll need a receipt, too, please.

Okay, here is your item, along with the receipt. Be careful
with it!
Here you go. The Fully Poseable Sayori figure is all yours.
You'll have to tell me sometime what you needed this for.
You took the action figure to Vulcanusmon.
You're back. And you brought me something?

Thank you. Let's see here... Wait. Is this what I think it
is?!
Wow! Th-This is amazing! I can't believe my eyes right now!
{next}Are you impressed?
{next}What's so amazing about it?
{next}I'm sick of hearing about this!

Impressed doesn't begin to describe how I feel! I'm
overwhelmed with emotion!

It'd take forever to explain. The details are so flawless,
it looks like it's alive!

Y-You are? Well, I'm simply glad you found me something so
amazing.

The skill on display in Akihabara is beyond my wildest
dreams. I must study this figure.

You did an amazing job. Thank you so much! Take this as a
token of my gratitude.

I must say... Akihabara has to be an absolute paradise if
it's full of items like this!

I can't ask someone to go on my behalf all the time. I must
visit it for myself someday!
